description: Compound probes over the frozen pytorch corpus (Python). Each case stacks many clauses and enrichment fields into one query, narrowing to 1-3 rows, then chains SHOW steps against the captured node_id. Python-specific notes: the naming enricher does NOT fire on Python rows, and has_escape only fires on the C++ side of the tree, so Python cases EXCLUDE torch/csrc/**.

steps.fql: FIND symbols WHERE fql_kind = 'function' WHERE has_unused_reassign = 'true' WHERE decl_far_count >= 50 WHERE has_shadow = 'true' IN 'torch/**' EXCLUDE 'torch/csrc/**'
SHOW outline OF '${FN}' WHERE fql_kind = 'if' WHERE depth >= 7

FIND symbols WHERE fql_kind = 'function' WHERE has_todo = 'true' WHERE has_unused_param = 'true' WHERE param_count >= 7 WHERE branch_count >= 20 IN 'torch/**' EXCLUDE 'torch/csrc/**' ORDER BY name ASC
SHOW outline OF '${FN}' WHERE fql_kind = 'if' WHERE depth = 2

cases.name: python_heavily_recursive_functions
cases.fql: FIND symbols WHERE fql_kind = 'function' WHERE is_recursive = 'true' WHERE recursion_count >= 8 WHERE param_count >= 3 IN 'torch/**' EXCLUDE 'torch/csrc/**' ORDER BY name ASC

cases.name: python_dunder_methods_with_huge_param_lists
cases.fql: FIND symbols WHERE fql_kind = 'function' WHERE name MATCHES '^__.*__$' WHERE param_count >= 40 IN 'torch/**' EXCLUDE 'torch/csrc/**' ORDER BY param_count DESC

cases.name: python_magic_scientific_notation_literals_group_by_file
cases.fql: FIND symbols WHERE fql_kind = 'number' WHERE num_format = 'scientific' WHERE is_magic = 'true' IN 'torch/**' GROUP BY file ORDER BY count DESC LIMIT 3

cases.name: python_most_complex_boolean_conditions
cases.fql: FIND symbols WHERE fql_kind = 'if' WHERE condition_tests >= 12 IN 'torch/**' EXCLUDE 'torch/csrc/**' EXCLUDE 'torch/nativert/**' ORDER BY line ASC
